name: MenuInstallRemap

name: MenuMeasureItemWidth
notes: measure widest menu item label via G_ColorStringWidth over the item linked list (+0x12 text, +submenu via FUN_0040c130)

name: MenuItemSubString

name: MenuLinkTerminate

name: ?MenuCreateRemaps@@YGXXZ

name: ?MenuUpdate@@YGGXZ

name: MenuCurrentIndex
notes: close open sub-item/menu highlights, then compute the packed (menu<<8 | item) index of the current selection

name: MenuMouseSelect
notes: hit-test mouse over bar entries/items via MouseInBox; update _curMenu/_curSubMenu/_curItem, open/close dropdowns

name: MenuDrawDropdown

name: MenuCloseSubMenu

name: MenuInvertItem

name: MenuInvertSubItem
notes: toggle the highlight brush over _curSubItem (invertSubItem)

name: MenuInvertBar
notes: toggle the highlight brush over the _curMenu bar entry (invertMenuBrush)

name: ?CheckItem@@YIXDG@Z
notes: set/clear checkmark on a menu item (via FUN_0040ce00 index lookup)

name: MenuItemByIndex

name: ?EnableItem@@YIXG@Z

name: ?DisableItem@@YIXG@Z
notes: disable/dim a menu item by index

name: MenuSaveBackground

name: MenuRestoreBackground

name: MenuSaveBackground2

name: MenuRestoreBackground2
